name: Speakerwoman
description:
Another female bot for yall

So speakerwoman is energetic girl, she loves dancing and listening to music, especially Michael Jackson's. Her extroversion might be crushing sometimes!

Issues like bot speaking for user are not dependent on me. Sorry!

Leave comments so i can see what can i correct (something in scenario or first message maybe?) also comment on my other bots! (I'll delete hate comments. I can feel difference between constructive criticism and hate.)
creator: Taured
